steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content: The maximum depth is the vertex, so write the quadratic as $g(t)=a(t-7)^2+352.8$. The surface is reached at $t=14$, so $g(14)=0$.

steps.title: Find the coefficient
steps.content: Substitute $t=14$ and solve for $a$: $0=a(14-7)^2+352.8$, so $49a=-352.8$ and $a=-7.2$.

steps.title: Evaluate twelve minutes
steps.content: Use $g(t)=-7.2(t-7)^2+352.8$ at $t=12$: $g(12)=-7.2(12-7)^2+352.8=172.8$. Rounded to the nearest meter gives $173$. The answer is 173.
